name: TopBuild Corp
summary: PART I Item 1. BUSINES S Overview TopBuild Corp., headquartered in Daytona Beach, Florida, is a leading installer of insulation and commercial roofing and a specialty distributor of insulation and other building products to the construction industry in the United States and Canada. On July 1, 2015, we began trading on the NYSE under the symbol BLD.
